name: Pexa Group Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$11.1600, stop A$10.2267, target A$12.8400 (1.80:1) — then trail it.
